tree.setup: A bank branch, mid-afternoon. You need to wire money internationally -- your friend in the US needs it for tuition. The international transfer specialist, Xiao Ding, handles these with the precision of a watchmaker. She has a small world map pinned behind her desk with tiny flags showing every country she's wired money to. There are a lot of flags.
tree.setup_zh: 银行网点，下午三点。你需要国际汇款——美国的朋友交学费需要。国际汇款专员小丁处理每笔业务都像钟表匠。她桌子后面的墙上钉着一张小世界地图，上面插着她汇过款的每个国家的小旗子。旗子很多。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 您好，请问您要办理什么业务？
turns.text_pinyin: nín hǎo, qǐngwèn nín yào bànlǐ shénme yèwù?
turns.text_en: Hello, what would you like to do?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Explain you need to send money abroad.

options.text_zh: 我想往美国汇一笔钱，是给朋友交学费的。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ xiǎng wǎng měiguó huì yì bǐ qián, shì gěi péngyou jiāo xuéfèi de.
options.text_en: I'd like to wire some money to the US for my friend's tuition.
options.feedback: Xiao Ding nods and pulls out the international transfer form with the reverence of someone handling a diplomatic treaty.「汇多少美元？」往 + country + 汇 is the pattern for wiring money abroad.

options.text_zh: 国际汇款手续费是多少？
options.text_en: What's the fee for an international wire?
options.feedback: Xiao Ding explains the fee structure clearly.「看金额。五千美元以下收一百五十块手续费。」手续费 means 'handling fee' -- always ask before committing.

options.text_zh: 用手机可以国际汇款吗？
options.text_pinyin: yòng shǒujī kěyǐ guójì huìkuǎn ma?
options.text_en: Can I do an international wire by phone?
options.feedback: Xiao Ding shakes her head gently.「国际汇款必须到柜台办理。需要填表、签字。」Some things still require showing up in person.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好的。请填写这张汇款单。需要对方的银行名称、账号和SWIFT代码。
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo de. qǐng tiánxiě zhè zhāng huìkuǎn dān. xūyào duìfāng de yínháng míngchēng, zhànghào hé SWIFT dàimǎ.
turns.text_en: OK. Please fill out this wire transfer form. You'll need the recipient's bank name, account number, and SWIFT code.

options.text_zh: SWIFT代码我有。但是我不确定银行的英文全称，可以帮我查一下吗？
options.text_pinyin: SWIFT dàimǎ wǒ yǒu. dànshì wǒ bú quèdìng yínháng de yīngwén quánchēng, kěyǐ bāng wǒ chá yíxià ma?
options.text_en: I have the SWIFT code. But I'm not sure of the bank's full English name. Can you help me look it up?
options.feedback: Xiao Ding types the SWIFT code and the full name appears on her screen.「找到了。」她用铅笔在表格上轻轻写下来。不确定 means 'not sure' -- honest and saves time.

options.text_pinyin: shénme shì SWIFT dàimǎ? wǒ bú tài dǒng.
options.text_en: What's a SWIFT code? I don't really understand.
options.feedback: Xiao Ding explains without judgment.「每个银行都有一个国际代码，就像银行的身份证号。让你朋友发给你就行。」不太懂 is 'don't really understand.'

options.text_zh: 我朋友说他会把信息发给我，能等一会儿吗？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ péngyou shuō tā huì bǎ xìnxī fā gěi wǒ, néng děng yíhuìr ma?
options.text_en: My friend said he'll send me the info. Can you wait a moment?
options.feedback: Xiao Ding glances at the queue.「可以，但是最好准备好了再来，今天人比较多。」等一会儿 is 'wait a moment.' Coming prepared is always better.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 表格填好了。一共汇两千美元，手续费一百五十元人民币。确认一下？
turns.text_pinyin: biǎogé tián hǎo le. yígòng huì liǎngqiān měiyuán, shǒuxùfèi yìbǎi wǔshí yuán rénmínbì. quèrèn yíxià?
turns.text_en: Form is complete. Total wire: 2000 USD, handling fee 150 RMB. Can you confirm?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Confirm and ask about arrival time.

options.text_pinyin: quèrèn. qián dàgài duō jiǔ néng dào?
options.text_en: Confirmed. How long until the money arrives?
options.feedback: Xiao Ding checks.「一般两到三个工作日。到了以后系统会通知您。」多久能到 is 'how long until it arrives.' Xiao Ding adds a tiny American flag to her map.

options.text_zh: 好的，没问题。谢谢你的帮助！
options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, méi wèntí. xièxie nǐ de bāngzhù!
options.text_en: OK, no problem. Thanks for your help!
options.feedback: Xiao Ding stamps the form with a single clean impression.「不客气。有问题随时来。」

options.text_zh: 如果钱没到怎么办？可以退款吗？
options.text_pinyin: rúguǒ qián méi dào zěnme bàn? kěyǐ tuìkuǎn ma?
options.text_en: What if the money doesn't arrive? Can I get a refund?
options.feedback: Xiao Ding reassures you.「基本不会出问题。万一有问题，拿着回单来找我，我帮您追踪。」万一 means 'in case' -- a useful worry-management word.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好了，汇款已经提交了。这是回单，请保存好。祝一切顺利！
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo le, huìkuǎn yǐjīng tíjiāo le. zhè shì huídān, qǐng bǎocún hǎo. zhù yíqiè shùnlì!
turns.text_en: Done, the wire has been submitted. Here's your receipt, please keep it safe. Wishing you all the best!

tree.cultural_note: International wire transfers (国际汇款) in China must be done at bank counters with proper documentation. SWIFT codes are required. Fees vary by bank and amount. Keep your receipt (回单) -- it's your proof of transfer.
